mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_voting_reminder_delivery ( outbox_event_id, subject_id, tenant_id, building_id, opid, uid, phone, channel, message_template, message, delivery_status, created_at ) SELECT #{outboxEventId}, #{subjectId}, #{tenantId}, #{buildingId}, op.opid, op.uid, a.phone, 'SMS', #{messageTemplate}, #{message}, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM t_voting_subject subj JOIN c_owner_property op ON op.tenant_id = subj.tenant_id AND op.building_id = #{buildingId} AND op.account_status = 1 JOIN c_user cu ON cu.uid = op.uid JOIN t_account a ON a.account_id = cu.account_id LEFT JOIN t_vote_item vi ON vi.subject_id = subj.subject_id AND vi.opid = op.opid WHERE subj.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND subj.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND subj.status = 3 AND vi.vote_id IS NULL ON CONFLICT (outbox_event_id, opid, channel) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: UPDATE t_voting_reminder_delivery SET delivery_status = 2, attempts = attempts + 1, last_attempt_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error = NULL WHERE delivery_id IN ( SELECT delivery_id FROM t_voting_reminder_delivery WHERE delivery_status IN (1, 4) AND attempts < 5 ORDER BY created_at ASC, delivery_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) RETURNING delivery_id, outbox_event_id, subject_id, tenant_id, building_id, opid, uid, phone, channel, message_template, message, attempts
mapper.update: UPDATE t_voting_reminder_delivery SET delivery_status = 3, provider_message_id = #{providerMessageId}, confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error = NULL WHERE delivery_id = #{deliveryId}
